name: Sweet Potato Surprise
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling water to cover in a Dutch oven for 30 minutes or until tender; drain and cool slightly.
2. Peel potatoes and cut into chunks. Set aside.
3. Melt 3/4 cup butter in the Dutch oven over low heat. Stir in marshmallow cream, constantly stirring until smooth.
4. Beat potatoes, marshmallow cream mixture, eggs, sugar, and milk with an electric mixer in batches until smooth. Scrape down sides as needed.
5. Spoon the potato mixture into a 13 x 9 inch baking dish.
6. Melt 1/3 cup butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. Stir in brown sugar, then add cereal and pecans, stirring to combine.
7. Sprinkle the cornflakes and pecans evenly over the potato mixture.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour. Yield: 10 servings.
